Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

CTN 4, 166 [Šu’ila to Tašmetu][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

⸢a*-na*⸣ dtaš-⸢me⸣-[tu₄ ...]

To Tašmetu [...],

o 22

šur-bu-ti a-ša₂-⸢rit⸣-[ti ...]

Supreme, first and foremost [...],

o 33

an-gal-la-tu₄ ⸢RA?⸣ [...]

Wise, ... [...],

o 44

ga-ma-li-tu₄ mut-ta-la-⸢tu₄⸣ [...]

Always obliging, noble [...],

o 55

⸢ša*-qu⸣-tu le-ʾi-it DINGIR-MEŠ

Elevated, powerful among the gods,

o 66

[...] MA? ta-na-da-ti x [...]

[...] ... praises ... [...].

o 77

x Aʾ u₂-šat-⸢bu⸣ [...]

They will raise ... [...].

o 88

[...] x AN TI AB₂ x [...]

[...] ... [...].

o 99

[...] x ⸢BA⸣ x [...]

[...] ... [...].

(rest of obverse missing)
Reverse
rr reverse uninscribed
